prompt: We have an existing e-commerce app and we're adding a new 'wishlists' feature. Users can create multiple wishlists, add products, share wishlists with friends via link, and friends can mark items as 'bought' so there are no duplicate gifts. I only want the journey for the wishlist sharing and gift-coordination part, not the full e-commerce experience.

assertions.text: Journey is scoped to wishlist sharing and gift coordination only — does NOT include product browsing, cart, checkout, or general e-commerce flows
Output contains between 3 and 6 phases (narrow scope should mean fewer phases)
Journey addresses both the wishlist creator and the friend/recipient perspectives
Every phase has a 'Happy path' section with numbered steps
Output contains a valid Mermaid diagram
Journey explicitly covers the 'mark as bought' deduplication mechanism
